privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real NREL TMY weather data for Phoenix, AZ, simulating a hypothetical 50 MW PV system. The optimal O&M rate that maximizes the 25-year gross margin (at $0.08/kWh PPA) was calculated via independent PySAM simulation to be $18/kW-yr, which contradicts the mock JSON optimal rate of $17 in the prompt. The baseline annual energy production is approximately 86.8 million kWh, which is successfully bounded by the verified energy_min (80,000,000) and energy_max (120,000,000). All 11 scenarios ($15 to $25) and their financial formulas follow the stated parameters exactly.
